textbook_study_path: 第一遍先读首页截图、摘要与引言，确认研究问题和场景假设。
第二遍沿着技术路线图复现模型变量、约束和求解器输入输出。
第三遍逐节阅读 section deep reading，对照 PDF 截图检查公式、图表和实验。
第四遍只站在审稿人视角重读实验，判断 baseline、公平性、消融和鲁棒性。
最后把博士 checklist 写成自己的复现实验或论文拓展计划。

section_deep_reading.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立研究动机：为什么传统信号控制、FCFS 或单车控制不足以处理该论文关注的交叉口协同问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Understand why the paper needs a new coordination method rather than a standard signal, FCFS, or single-vehicle controller.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这一部分通常把痛点落到 Spatial-domain robust trajectory planning：既要提高效率，又要保持安全与在线可执行。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 精读时标出作者批判的 baseline、场景假设、交通参与者类型和隐含优化目标。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者指出的痛点是否真的需要新方法，还是可以由更强的优化器/更保守规则解决？

section_deep_reading.heading: II. PROBLEM FORMULATION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 把自然语言交通问题压缩为变量、状态、约束、目标函数或图结构。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Translate the traffic problem into variables, states, constraints, objectives, or graph relations.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 本节是复现论文的核心入口，应与公式“空间域动力学与鲁棒碰撞约束 / Spatial-domain dynamics and robust collision constraints”一起读。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 逐项检查车辆状态、冲突关系、控制输入、时间/空间索引和安全阈值是否定义完整。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 这些建模假设在混合交通、通信延迟、感知误差和高密度车流下是否仍成立？

section_deep_reading.heading: III. M ODELING OF CONFLICT RESOLUTION CONSIDERING
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 承接前后章节，补充局部定义、案例或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Recover implementation details needed for reproduction.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这类章节常常不是主贡献，但决定你能否真正复现方法。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 检查它是否给出了参数、伪代码、场景划分或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 跳过该节会不会导致公式或实验无法复现？

section_deep_reading.heading: IV. C ENTRALIZED MODEL PREDICTIVE CONTROL AND
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 把自然语言交通问题压缩为变量、状态、约束、目标函数或图结构。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Translate the traffic problem into variables, states, constraints, objectives, or graph relations.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 本节是复现论文的核心入口，应与公式“空间域动力学与鲁棒碰撞约束 / Spatial-domain dynamics and robust collision constraints”一起读。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 逐项检查车辆状态、冲突关系、控制输入、时间/空间索引和安全阈值是否定义完整。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 这些建模假设在混合交通、通信延迟、感知误差和高密度车流下是否仍成立？

section_deep_reading.heading: V. SIMULATION RESULTS
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 验证方法是否在公平基准下改善效率、安全、能耗或计算时间。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Check whether the claimed improvements are supported by fair baselines and meaningful metrics.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 实验应与论文声称的贡献闭环：Simulation case studies; reported RTI computation reduction by orders of magnitude with small optimality loss.
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 重点追踪指标：求解时间、最优性损失、碰撞约束余量、通行时间、速度平滑性和不确定性敏感性。 同时检查仿真平台、交通需求和随机性设置。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 实验是否只展示平均收益，还是覆盖了高密度、异常扰动和失败案例？

section_deep_reading.heading: VI. CONCLUSION AND FUTURE WORK
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 提炼作者承认的边界，并把它转化为博士课题的可拓展问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Convert acknowledged boundaries into research opportunities.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 结论不只是总结结果，更是观察作者没有解决什么的窗口。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 把 future work 与前文假设逐一对应，寻找可发表的补强点。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 如果我是审稿人，我会要求补哪一个实验、定理或消融？

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 先把作者的痛点翻译成一句博士问题：在路径和速度存在不确定性时，如何把交叉口多类型冲突统一成可实时求解的空间域约束？ 读这一段时不要急着接受动机，要追问传统 FCFS、信号灯或保守 MPC 为什么不足。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Turn the opening motivation into one doctoral-level question and test whether the paper truly needs a new method.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Assumption and setting / 假设与场景段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把车辆类型、通信条件、路口类型和动力学假设列成表。该文的关键边界包括：车辆路径可用空间坐标参数化。；不确定性集合边界可估计且不严重失真。；集中式求解器可在控制周期内完成。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: List vehicle type, communication, intersection setting, and dynamics assumptions before reading the equations.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Model and notation / 模型与符号段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 围绕核心公式“空间域动力学与鲁棒碰撞约束 / Spatial-domain dynamics and robust collision constraints”复写符号表，确认每个变量是决策变量、状态变量、参数还是约束阈值。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Rewrite the symbol table around the core formulation and classify variables as states, decisions, parameters, or constraints.

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把算法读成一条数据流：输入交通状态，执行 Transforms coordinated control into a spatial-domain nonlinear program with unified linear collision-avoidance constraints and real-time iteration.，输出可执行通行/控制决策，并检查安全接口。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Read the algorithm as a dataflow from traffic state to executable sequence/control decision, with explicit safety interfaces.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Experiment and evidence / 实验证据段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 不要只看作者报告的提升，要检查基准、公平性和指标。本文验证描述为：Simulation case studies; reported RTI computation reduction by orders of magnitude with small optimality loss.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Go beyond reported gains and inspect baselines, fairness, metrics, and computation time.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Reviewer synthesis / 审稿式总结段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 最后把贡献拆成可发表与需补强两部分。对你课题最直接的用途是：Very strong for the smoother's feasibility and robust collision-avoidance constraints.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Separate publishable contribution from missing evidence, then connect the result to your own thesis architecture.

technical_route.content: 车辆状态、路径/车道、交通需求、信号或协同信息。
空间域动力学与鲁棒碰撞约束 / Spatial-domain dynamics and robust collision constraints
Transforms coordinated control into a spatial-domain nonlinear program with unified linear collision-avoidance constraints and real-time iteration.
Handles crossing, following, merging, and diverging conflicts under path and speed uncertainty of HDVs.
Generates smooth trajectories under state/control constraints, avoiding unnecessary braking where robust constraints permit.
Simulation case studies; reported RTI computation reduction by orders of magnitude with small optimality loss.

doctoral_checklist: 能否独立重写核心公式：空间域动力学与鲁棒碰撞约束 / Spatial-domain dynamics and robust collision constraints，并解释每个符号的物理意义？
能否画出输入-模型-算法-控制-验证的数据流图？
能否指出至少两个强假设，并说明它们在真实交通中何时失效？
能否复述实验基准是否公平，指标是否覆盖效率、安全、能耗和计算时间？
能否提出一个与自己 JSSP/RL/smoother 课题直接相连的拓展实验？

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Spatial-domain robust trajectory planning”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Spatial-domain robust trajectory planning. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Optimization-heavy; not a learned scheduler, and publication venue beyond arXiv not verified.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 在路径和速度存在不确定性时，如何把交叉口多类型冲突统一成可实时求解的空间域约束？
overview.core_question_en: How can crossing, following, merging, and diverging conflicts be unified as real-time spatial-domain constraints under motion uncertainty?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Transforms coordinated control into a spatial-domain nonlinear program with unified linear collision-avoidance constraints and real-time iteration.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Handles crossing, following, merging, and diverging conflicts under path and speed uncertainty of HDVs.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Generates smooth trajectories under state/control constraints, avoiding unnecessary braking where robust constraints permit.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：很强：空间域建模和统一线性碰撞约束对低层 smoother 安全可行性极有价值。

methodology.model_name: 空间域动力学与鲁棒碰撞约束 / Spatial-domain dynamics and robust collision constraints
symbols: 把时间规划转成沿路径规划
决定到达时间和安全间隔
车辆 i,j 的冲突间隔函数
methodology.algorithm_zh: 论文把轨迹规划从时间域转为空间域，针对 crossing/following/merging/diverging 构造统一线性化安全约束，再用集中式 MPC 和实时迭代求解，以较小最优性损失换取计算速度。
methodology.algorithm_en: The method transforms coordination into a spatial-domain nonlinear program, linearizes unified collision-avoidance constraints, and solves it with real-time MPC iterations.
methodology.stability_zh: 鲁棒性来自显式不确定集合与安全约束，实时性来自空间域简化和 RTI。相比纯学习策略，这类 smoother 更容易给审稿人安全信心。
methodology.stability_en: Robustness comes from explicit uncertainty sets and safety constraints; RTI makes the spatial-domain MPC viable online.
assumptions: 车辆路径可用空间坐标参数化。
不确定性集合边界可估计且不严重失真。
集中式求解器可在控制周期内完成。

experiments.validation: Simulation case studies; reported RTI computation reduction by orders of magnitude with small optimality loss.
experiments.baselines: 时间域 MPC、非鲁棒控制、保守安全间隔策略和不同 RTI 近似。
experiments.metrics: 求解时间、最优性损失、碰撞约束余量、通行时间、速度平滑性和不确定性敏感性。
experiments.ablation: 很适合做鲁棒半径、RTI 次数、统一约束 vs 分类型约束的消融。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。
关注约束激活位置、速度/加速度曲线和安全裕度是否平滑。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 优化问题仍可能在大规模车辆数下变重。
不确定集合若估计过小会失去安全性，过大则过于保守。
高层排序/优先级选择不是主要贡献。
extensions: 将 JSSP 调度输出作为 MPC 的目标时间或优先级约束。
用学习模型预测不确定集合大小，实现自适应鲁棒性。
把空间域安全约束封装成调度动作可行性检查器。
critique.project_use: Very strong for the smoother's feasibility and robust collision-avoidance constraints.

interactive.response_zh: 半径越大，安全裕度越高但轨迹越保守、延误越大。
interactive.response_en: A larger uncertainty radius improves safety margin but increases conservatism.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
